testcase.name: test_register_returns_token
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_plos_api.py:41: in fresh_user assert r.status_code == 200, f"register failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_744cf90b20@plos.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_rejected
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_plos_api.py:41: in fresh_user assert r.status_code == 200, f"register failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_744cf90b20@plos.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
